definition: Feeling pleased and full of joy about something.
Feeling unhappy and angry because someone has something you want.
Feeling very afraid or scared because of something threatening.
Feeling sad because something was not as good as you hoped.
Feeling very enthusiastic and eager about something upcoming.
Not able to think clearly or understand something properly.
Feeling pleased about something you or others have done very well.
Feeling worried and anxious about something that might happen.
Feeling happy because a worry or problem has gone away.
Feeling uncomfortable and shy because of something awkward.
Feeling extremely tired with no energy left at all.
Feeling extremely angry about something that has happened.
